answer:
The agricultural health in this village shows a marked improvement over the last year. 

### Evidence
NDVI has increased from 0.45 to 0.61. 

### Reasoning
This is primarily due to better irrigation practices introduced last season, resulting in less crop stress.

### Recommendation
Continue expanding the micro-irrigation network.

recommendations.title: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
recommendations.reason: Triggered by expansion of micro-irrigation network.
